---
name: generate_markdown_report
description: Generate a structured markdown report from car search results
---

# Purpose
Create a clean and readable Markdown report summarizing search results.

# Structure

# 🚗 FindMyCar Report

## Summary

Provide overview of results and market feasibility.

## Best Listings

For each car include:

- Model
- Price
- Mileage
- Horsepower
- Location
- Link

## Comparison Table

| Model | Year | km | ch | Price | Location |

## Recommendation

Provide the best choice and explain why.

# Output File

FindMyCar_Report.md
